title: Trio Standup

summary.action_items:
**Ilse Funkhouser**
Provide a document with two tabs for AI overview and instructions (00:15)
Enable role-based email additions and silent scans with auto-apply functionality (01:44)
Implement and test safeguards preventing multiple simultaneous scans on the same role (03:42)
Share examples of scans for user experimentation while advising on cost control (03:10)

**Vrijen Attawar**
Review the shared document and experiment with scan settings and thresholds as advised (00:41)
Provide update on scan usage and feedback to Ilse the next day (05:12)
summary.shorthand_bullet:
📄 **Document Overview** (00:28 - 00:41)
Discussed careful management of credit access to avoid misuse in AI-driven candidate scans.
Explained adding email addresses to roles to enable silent scans for basic candidate info collection.
📊 **Vibe Check Thresholds** (01:44 - 03:09)
Clarified vibe check thresholds controlling candidate visibility and auto-application in the system.
Enabled limits of 250 days on scans with no minimum story restrictions for user flexibility.
⚠️ **Scan Limitations** (03:42 - 04:51)
Warned about simultaneous scan attempts on the same role potentially causing failures.
Described automated email notifications to candidates after scans with transparent and humorous messaging.
🤖 **Automation Goals** (04:51 - 05:14)
Emphasized the objective to reduce manual work and simplify candidate matching.
Confirmed next update to be shared the following day.
summary.overview:
- **AI-Driven Candidate Scanning**: New silent scan automates candidate applications based on vibe check, minimizing manual effort and maintaining privacy.  
- **Access and Resource Control**: Role-based access prevents duplicate scans; CSV exports will be enriched later to improve data quality.  
- **Cost Management Strategy**: Credit limit of 250 active scanning days set to control resource consumption and prevent budget overruns.  
- **Positive User Experience**: Light, casual email tone to candidates mitigates concerns while maintaining a positive employer brand.  
- **Testing and Improvements**: Silent scan system ready for testing; further enhancements planned based on user feedback and cost monitoring.  
- **Feedback Loop Established**: Continuous progress tracking ensures alignment, issue resolution, and agile delivery of new features.
